signal_rules.GREEN: All active registry connector entries are internal reference only and/or explicit mock/simulation posture; Phase 1 policy flags satisfied.
signal_rules.YELLOW: Optional metadata incomplete or advisory gaps (no forbidden live lanes).
signal_rules.BLUE: At least one connector entry awaits AMK/charter classification for a future external lane (no live execution in Phase 1).
signal_rules.RED: Live external action, secret storage, payment, provider call, webhook execution, production deploy linkage, customer-data flow enabled in registry/fixtures when disallowed.
